title: erigeron robustus
intro: Erigeron robustus, also known as robust mountain fleabane, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and southwestern Canada. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, with medicinal compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids contributing to its therapeutic effects. Consuming Erigeron robustus tea or tincture may help alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory infections, as well as reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Erigeron robustus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to suit different uses and applications.
